name: Isabella Beach Club
description: A beach club on the Platges de Fornells, on the north coast: a chill-out area, cocktails and dinners with one of the north's best sunsets.

practicalInfo.horario: Seasonal; opening hours change each season — check the venue's website or Instagram.

editorial.lead: The south has its much-photographed sunsets, but the north keeps the wildest ones. Isabella Beach Club sits on a rocky promontory at the water's edge on the Platges de Fornells, and there —over sushi, grilled plates and a drink— the sun goes down over the northern sea.

sections.heading: The northern sunset
body: Menorca's north coast is its most rugged: wind, rock and a sea that isn't always calm. Isabella makes the most of exactly that. It's perched on a rocky promontory level with the water, on the Platges de Fornells, and it has made a name for its sunsets —wilder and quieter than the south's.
It's a place to arrive with time, order something and let the sky do its work.

sections.heading: Sushi, grill and cocktails
body: The kitchen looks east and to the Mediterranean at once: Asian-Spanish fusion, with sushi and the grill as specialities, local produce and a good cocktail list. Some nights there's a DJ, and the mix —a good table, a drink and soft music facing the sea— is its signature.
Dinners run by reservation, so it pays to plan ahead: this isn't a place to improvise at the last minute in summer.

sections.heading: How to do it, calmly
body: Book dinner in advance through the website, choose a table facing west and let the evening run from sunset to the last drink. It's one of those plans that make the trip up north worth it.

goodToKnow: On a rocky promontory at the water's edge on the Platges de Fornells (north coast).
Asian-Mediterranean fusion: sushi, grill, local produce and cocktails.
Dinners are by reservation (their own online system).
DJ music on some nights; programme and hours are seasonal → check the official site.
editorial.transferText: The way back runs along the north's dark, winding secondary roads, and after a drink, driving is the last thing you want. We'll take you there and bring you back with a private chauffeur.
